scripts.test: npm run clean:report && npm run cy:run; npm run merge:report && npm run gen:html

scripts.test:template: npm run clean:report && cypress run --spec cypress/e2e/template-attributes.cy.js; npm run merge:report && npm run gen:html
scripts.test:brand: npm run clean:report && cypress run --spec cypress/e2e/brand.cy.js; npm run merge:report && npm run gen:html
scripts.test:supplier: npm run clean:report && cypress run --spec cypress/e2e/supplier.cy.js; npm run merge:report && npm run gen:html
scripts.test:product: npm run clean:report && cypress run --spec cypress/e2e/product.cy.js; npm run merge:report && npm run gen:html
scripts.test:tag: npm run clean:report && cypress run --spec cypress/e2e/tag.cy.js; npm run merge:report && npm run gen:html
